records.ety: [Cf. F. effectuer. See Effect, n. & v. t.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Effectuated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Effectuating.]

defs: To bring to pass; to effect; to achieve; to accomplish; to fulfill.
quotes: A fit instrument to effectuate his desire.
In order to effectuate the thorough reform.
